title: Compositle
body:
![Compositle - A Minecraft Visualization Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62029dc69e914f58c2364c8214af8f8a42bf96a5.png)
Create new and stunning visuals, all in one mod.\
Compositle allows creative leads to break the boundaries of visual effects.

![Text - Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caafd8f0dfb87e6513471793e8f2eeedb28d9cf4.png)

**Current features:**
- Particles with custom applicable; texture, animation, scale, location, speed, gravity, drag, color and frame animation.
- Custom on-screen effects; entity tint.

![Text - FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19cb5850e39c6be5a31330694a226cbacbd45f14.png)

**What is the primary use of this mod?**
This mod was created to aid in visual application on privately hosted Minecraft events and servers.

**What version does Compositle run on?**
Currently, Compositle only supports 1.21.3.

**Can I make use of this mod on my server / event?**
Compositle is in early stages, therefor, it's primary use is for privately hosted Minecraft events and servers. *If you host consistent Minecraft events / servers and would like to make use of this mod, please reach out to @lafless on Discord* - Please do not reach out unless you have a portfolio to show your previous events / active servers.
